studyName: Characterization of Clonal Evolution in Microsatellite Unstable Metastatic Cancers through Multi-Regional Tumor Sequencing

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, comment, histological type of sample, tumor status of sample, and sequencing center of participants with metastatic cancers and involved in the "Characterization of Clonal Evolution in Microsatellite Unstable Metastatic Cancers through Multi-Regional Tumor Sequencing" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, sex, and affection status of participants with metastatic cancers and involved in the "Characterization of Clonal Evolution in Microsatellite Unstable Metastatic Cancers through Multi-Regional Tumor Sequencing" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for microsatellite unstable cancer

tables.description: Subject ID and consent group of participants with metastatic cancers and involved in the "Characterization of Clonal Evolution in Microsatellite Unstable Metastatic Cancers through Multi-Regional Tumor Sequencing" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID and sample ID of participants with metastatic cancers and involved in the "Characterization of Clonal Evolution in Microsatellite Unstable Metastatic Cancers through Multi-Regional Tumor Sequencing" project.
